title: Eid Gift Guide: Eidi, Clothes, Sweets, and Perfumes
description: The article provides a list of traditional gifts given during Eid, including Eidi (money), new clothes, sweets, and perfumes, and explains the symbolic importance of each gift.

title: Eid al-Fitr: A Hands-On Guide to Celebrating the Fast's End
